name: infection_control
description: a hospital infection-spread world (SIR-like) with isolation capacity; actions isolate, treat, screen

card.description: a hospital infection-spread world (SIR-like) with isolation capacity; actions isolate, treat, screen

rules: Patients flow Susceptible -> Infected -> Recovered; Isolated holds infected patients pulled into isolation beds. Total population N = susceptible + infected + isolated + recovered is conserved.

Each action advances exactly one day: circulating infected spread to susceptibles (isolated patients do not spread) and a baseline fraction of all active cases recovers, regardless of the action chosen.
'screen' reveals more of the circulating infected as 'detected'; you can only isolate cases you have detected.
'isolate' moves detected, circulating infected into free isolation beds, bounded by isolation_capacity; isolated patients stop spreading.
'treat' clears an extra fraction of all active infections (circulating and isolated) straight to recovered.
Isolated never exceeds isolation_capacity and no compartment goes negative.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action["name"]
    S = s["susceptible"]; I = s["infected"]; Q = s["isolated"]
    R = s["recovered"]; det = s["detected"]; cap = s["isolation_capacity"]
    N = S + I + Q + R

    beta = 0.35          # infections per circulating-infected contact, per day
    gamma = 0.10         # baseline fraction of active cases recovering per day
    screen_yield = 8     # circulating infected newly revealed by one screen
    treat_boost = 0.25   # extra fraction of active cases cleared by treatment

    # --- 1. immediate effect of the policy action -----------------------------
    if name == "screen":
        # testing can only reveal infected who are actually circulating
        det = min(I, det + screen_yield)
    elif name == "isolate":
        # move detected, circulating infected into free isolation beds
        free = max(0, cap - Q)
        moved = min(free, det, I)
        I -= moved; Q += moved; det -= moved
    elif name == "treat":
        # treatment clears a fraction of every active infection to recovered
        rec_I = int(round(treat_boost * I))
        rec_Q = int(round(treat_boost * Q))
        I -= rec_I; Q -= rec_Q; R += rec_I + rec_Q
        det = min(det, I)

    # --- 2. one natural epidemic day ------------------------------------------
    new_inf = min(S, int(round(beta * S * I / N))) if N > 0 else 0
    rec_I = int(round(gamma * I))
    rec_Q = int(round(gamma * Q))
    S -= new_inf
    I += new_inf - rec_I
    Q -= rec_Q
    R += rec_I + rec_Q
    det = min(det, I)    # fresh infections are undetected; clamp to circulating

    s["susceptible"] = S; s["infected"] = I; s["isolated"] = Q
    s["recovered"] = R; s["detected"] = det
    s["day"] = s["day"] + 1
    return s
